ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_type" INTEGER /* Type of the document (e.g., factsheet, prospectus, report) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the document was published */,
  "language" INTEGER /* Language of the document */,
  "filesize" TEXT /* Size of the document file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "doc_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The path to the document file on the server */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the document */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the document was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the document (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_doc_type FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the document type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the language is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the document was published */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "filesize" TEXT /* Size of the document file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the version was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* The department to which the user belongs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent of the device used to access the document */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* The session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the department is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
